title: Designing a Basic Gamer Persona
scenario: Create a brief persona description for a casual video game player. The description should include the player's age, gaming habits, and preferred genres. Use a conversational tone and keep the description under 200 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description meets the word count and tone constraints.
Check if the description includes the required information (age, gaming habits, preferred genres).
Check if the description is clear and easy to understand.
